output:
Day 1  
 Breakfast  
 • Scrambled eggs (2–3 eggs) with chopped tomato & baby spinach (small handful)  
 • 1 slice gluten-free toast with a smear of lactose-free spread  
 Lunch  
 • Grilled chicken breast with a side of roasted sweet potatoes  
 Dinner  
 • Mexican beef and potato skillet:  
   – Sauté ground beef with diced potatoes, bell peppers, and Mexican spices  
   – Serve with a side of avocado slices  
 Snack  
 • Apple slices with almond butter  

Day 2  
 Breakfast  
 • Gluten-free oats cooked in almond milk, topped with sliced strawberries and a sprinkle of cinnamon  
 Lunch  
 • Leftover Mexican beef and potato skillet  
 Dinner  
 • Thai coconut curry with chicken and vegetables:  
   – Sauté chicken with mixed vegetables in a Thai curry paste and coconut milk  
   – Serve over rice or rice noodles  
 Snack  
 • Carrot sticks with hummus  

Day 3  
 Breakfast  
 • Omelette (2–3 eggs) with diced bell peppers and dairy-free cheese  
 Lunch  
 • Baked salmon with a side of quinoa and roasted asparagus  
 Dinner  
 • Indian spiced lentil soup with potatoes:  
   – Cook lentils with diced potatoes and Indian spices  
   – Serve with a side of gluten-free naan bread  
 Snack  
 • Rice cakes with sliced cucumber  

Day 4  
 Breakfast  
 • GF toast with mashed avocado and cherry tomatoes  
 Lunch  
 • Thai beef salad:  
   – Grilled beef slices over a bed of mixed greens, cucumber, and a Thai dressing  
 Dinner  
 • Mexican stuffed sweet potatoes:  
   – Baked sweet potatoes stuffed with seasoned ground beef, black beans, and dairy-free cheese  
 Snack  
 • Mixed berries with dairy-free yogurt  

Day 5  
 Breakfast  
 • Breakfast hash: diced sweet potatoes sautéed with garlic, spinach, and cherry tomatoes; top with a fried egg  
 Lunch  
 • Indian spiced chicken with roasted cauliflower and basmati rice  
 Dinner  
 • Thai peanut chicken stir-fry:  
   – Sauté chicken with mixed vegetables in a Thai peanut sauce  
   – Serve over rice or rice noodles  
 Snack  
 • Rice cakes with almond butter  

Feel free to adjust portion sizes and ingredients based on your preferences and dietary needs. Enjoy your meals!
